---
title: "Kodiak Island Borough, Alaska Solid Waste Management Plan"
year: 2010
image: /images/kodiak_AK.jpg
image-alt: "Image of Kodiak, Alaska"
categories: ["Integrated Solid Waste Planning", "Service Procurement"]
---
{{< include _return-to-pf.qmd >}}

::: {.article}

# 2008-2010 Solid Waste Study and Collection Service Procurement

Bell & Associates was contracted by Kodiak Island Borough to evaluate the
existing solid waste collection and disposal methods to determine the most
comprehensive, environmentally sound, and cost-effective method of operation
for the Borough. A solid waste management plan was completed in July 2008 that
provided the Borough with three disposal system alternatives: landfill,
incineration, or barging to a distant landfill. The plan was officially adopted
by the Borough Assembly in September 2008, which recommended a fully carted
collection system, a lined landfill, and an expanded recycling program. The
project's second phase is assisting the Borough with procuring collection and
recycling services based on the direction of the solid waste plan. Proposals
were submitted in July 2009, and contract negotiations were completed in 2010.

[Solid Waste Management Plan](https://www.kodiakak.us/DocumentCenter/View/12647/Exhibit-A-August-2008-Kodiak-Island-Borough-Final-Solid-Waste-Management-Plan-Completed-by-Bell--Associates-)

[By James Brooks, CC BY 2.0](https://commons.wikimedia.org/w/index.php?curid=112970641)
:::
